meaning: n.使相等的东西,平衡装置,[电工]均衡器
examples: This simple technology has become a great social equalizer.
The earliest citation in Brave New Words is again from Jack Williamson (" The Equalizer ", 1947).
In the other match, Ivan Perisic's stoppage-time equalizer gave Bruges a deserved 2-2 draw at Toulouse.
Imagine a graphic equalizer on a stereo with five separate settings that slide up and down.
